name: Libation
short_desc: Free, open-source Audible audiobook manager - download, decrypt, and own your audiobooks
author: rmcrackan
description: Libation is a free, open-source application for managing your Audible audiobook library. It downloads and decrypts your audiobooks, removing DRM so you truly own your purchases. Supports multiple Audible regions and runs as a background service to automatically liberate new titles.

form_fields.label: Sleep Time
form_fields.hint: How often Libation checks for new books. Use Go duration format: 10m, 1h, 6h, etc. Set to -1 to run once and exit.
